[30;1m5565 | [0m[35m	      base64 += chars[((bytes[i] & 3) << 4) | (bytes[i + 1] >> 4)];[0m
[30;1m5566 | [0m[35m	      base64 += chars[((bytes[i + 1] & 15) << 2) | (bytes[i + 2] >> 6)];[0m
[30;1m5567 | [0m[35m	      base64 += chars[bytes[i + 2] & 63];[0m
